case_title: EDWARDS III, R BRYAN VS LIU, ARTHUR DBA INTER PACIFIC LAW GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDWARDS III, R BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR DBA INTER PACIFIC LAW GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COMPUTER PROBLEM, WHEN PLAINTIFF'S NAME WAS CORRECTED, REASON OF CLAIM WAS CUT OFF, ONLY REMEDY TAKEN WAS HANDWRITE REASON CUT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR DBA INTER PACIFIC LAW GROUP
DEFT'S MOTION TO DISMISS AND/OR POSTPONE TRIAL & REQUEST FOR ATTY FEES & COSTS, RETURNED W/ SCF 35.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, ARTHUR DBA INTER PACIFIC LAW GROUP DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY BECAUSE IT WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING AND NO GOOD CAUSE WAS SHOWN FOR THE LATE REQUEST. THE COURT WILL CONSIDER TH DEFT'S MAY 17, 2005 LETTER, FILED ON MAY 19, 2005. CASE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. PER THE ORIGINAL ATTORNEY-CLIENT AGREEMENT, DATED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT. FILED FORWARDED TO COURT FOR COMM.'S APPROVAL. HEARING ON 5/19/05 ($10 FEE PD BY CK).
